title: AI Fabrix External System Configuration Schema
description: Schema for configuring an external system connected to the AI Fabrix Dataplane. This defines authentication, OpenAPI/MCP bindings, field mappings defaults, metadata handling and portal inputs.

metadata.name: External System Configuration Schema
metadata.description: JSON schema for validating ExternalSystem configuration files
metadata.author: AI Fabrix Team

changes: Added identityPropagation configuration for impersonation, attribution, and system identity execution modes
Added tokenBroker mint endpoint and attribution field injection settings for runtime identity behavior
Optional rateLimit: outbound per-system rate limit (requestsPerWindow/windowSeconds or requestsPerSecond/burstSize); dataplane enforces and handles 429
Optional testEndpoint in authentication.variables for apikey: full URL or path (path resolved against baseUrl); credential test URL for E2E/credential step
Template-based authentication: method, variables (baseUrl when method not none), security (kv:// only), credentialKey, writeOnce
Credential created on deploy as authentication.credentialKey or <external-system.key>-cred
Added generateMcpContract (boolean, default true): config-only control for MCP contract generation on publish
Added generateOpenApiContract (boolean, default true): reserved for future use
Added RBAC roles and permissions support
RBAC roles/permissions are registered with miso-controller during deployment
Roles support Azure AD group mapping via Groups property
Permissions reference roles and are used for access control
Added OpenAPI and MCP contract configuration

variables.description: OAuth token endpoint. Full URL (https://...) or path (e.g. /oauth/v2/token); path is resolved against baseUrl.
OAuth authorization endpoint. Full URL or path; path is resolved against baseUrl. Required when grantType is authorization_code or omitted.
OAuth 2.0 grant type. One of: client_credentials, authorization_code. Default: authorization_code.
Optional URL used when testing the credential (GET). Full URL or path (path resolved against baseUrl). If omitted, baseUrl + /health is used.
Token endpoint. Full URL or path (path resolved against baseUrl).
Authorization endpoint. Full URL or path (path resolved against baseUrl). Required when grantType is authorization_code or omitted.
OAuth 2.0 grant type. One of: client_credentials, authorization_code. Default: authorization_code.
Optional URL used when testing the credential (GET). Full URL or path (path resolved against baseUrl). If omitted, baseUrl + /health is used.
Optional URL used when testing the credential (GET). Full URL (https://...) or path (e.g. /crm/v3/objects/contacts?limit=1); path is resolved against baseUrl. If omitted, baseUrl + /health is used.
Optional URL used when testing the credential (GET). Full URL or path (path resolved against baseUrl). If omitted, baseUrl + /health is used.
Optional URL used when testing the credential (GET). Full URL or path (path resolved against baseUrl). If omitted, baseUrl + /health is used.
Optional URL used when testing the credential (GET). Full URL or path. For OIDC, discovery URL is typically used if testEndpoint omitted.
Optional URL used when testing the credential (GET). Full URL or path (path resolved against baseUrl when baseUrl present).

key.description: Unique external system identifier (cannot be changed after creation). Example: 'hubspot', 'salesforce', 'teams'.

displayName.description: Human-readable name for the external system

description.description: Description of this external system integration

type.description: Integration type: OpenAPI-driven, MCP-driven, or custom Python connector.

credentialIdOrKey.description: Credential identifier (ID or key) to attach to this system. Used by dataplane when creating/updating system from deploy config.

internal.description: When true, this integration is deployed on dataplane startup (internal integration). When false or absent, deployed via pipeline only.

authentication.description: Template-based authentication. Required: method, variables. When method is not 'none', variables must include baseUrl and security must contain only kv:// references. On deploy, a credential is created with key authentication.credentialKey or <external-system.key>-cred. Template is write-once.

credentialKey.description: Stable reference key for the active credential. Default: <external-system.key>-cred.

displayName.description: Display name for the credential created from this template.

variables.description: Non-secret config. See $defs.authenticationVariablesByMethod for per-method keys. oauth2/aad: baseUrl, tokenUrl, authorizationUrl (optional; required when grantType is authorization_code or omitted), grantType (optional, default authorization_code); apikey: baseUrl, headerName (optional), prefix (optional), testEndpoint (optional); basic: baseUrl; queryParam: baseUrl, paramName; oidc: openIdConfigUrl, clientId; hmac: optional; none: empty. URL-valued variables (tokenUrl, authorizationUrl, testEndpoint) accept full URL or path; paths are resolved against baseUrl by the backend.

security.description: Secret-bearing keys only. Values must be kv:// references. See $defs.authenticationVariablesByMethod. oauth2/aad: clientId, clientSecret; apikey: apiKey; basic: username, password; queryParam: paramValue; oidc: none; hmac: signingSecret.

writeOnce.description: Template is immutable after first deploy; dataplane does not update the credential from this template again.

documentKey.description: Key of the OpenAPI document in the registry

dataSources.description: List of data source keys belonging to this external system. Each must match external-datasource.schema.json.

configuration.description: External system configuration variables (same pattern as application-schema).

roles.description: External system roles for Azure AD group mapping

value.description: Role identifier (used in JWT and ACL)

groups.description: Azure AD groups mapped to this role

permissions.description: External system permissions with role mappings for access control

endpoints.description: API endpoint configurations for this external system. Used for dynamic endpoint registration at application startup.

active.description: Whether this endpoint should be registered (defaults to true)

router.description: Custom router module path override (defaults to auto-discovery based on naming convention)

endpointsActive.description: Master switch for all endpoints in this system. If false, no endpoints are registered regardless of individual endpoint active flags.

generateMcpContract.description: Whether to generate MCP contract on publish. Config only (no query parameter); default true when absent.

generateOpenApiContract.description: Reserved: whether to generate or expose OpenAPI contract on publish. Not yet implemented.

triggerPathsHash.description: SHA256 hash of triggerPaths payload (64-char hex). Used to detect structural changes. Optional; Dataplane computes when absent.

identityPropagation.description: Declares supported identity propagation modes and defaults for outbound operations.

mintEndpoint.description: Controller endpoint for delegated token minting.

actorFieldMappings.description: Map target fields to actor templates (supports {{actor.*}} and {{request.*}}).

commentTemplate.description: Optional comment template for attribution logs (supports {{actor.*}}).

rateLimit.description: Outbound rate limit for requests from the dataplane to this external system. When set, the dataplane enforces the limit per base URL and handles HTTP 429 (wait and retry). When absent, global env defaults apply (CIP_EXECUTION_RATE_LIMIT_REQUESTS_PER_SECOND, CIP_EXECUTION_RATE_LIMIT_BURST_SIZE). Supports window-based (e.g. HubSpot 100/10s) or token-bucket style (requestsPerSecond + burstSize).

requestsPerWindow.description: Maximum requests allowed in the time window (window-based limit). Example: 100 for HubSpot's 100 requests per 10 seconds.

windowSeconds.description: Time window in seconds. Used with requestsPerWindow. Example: 10 for HubSpot (100 requests per 10 seconds).

requestsPerSecond.description: Sustained request rate (token-bucket style). When used with burstSize, allows short bursts up to burstSize while refilling at this rate.

burstSize.description: Maximum burst size in tokens (token-bucket style). Used with requestsPerSecond.

performance.description: Performance defaults for runtime paths in this external system.

cacheDefaults.description: Default cache policy inherited by datasources unless overridden under sync.cache.

certification.description: Public certification settings for external system version verification.

enabled.description: Enable public certification metadata for this external system.

publicKey.description: Public key used to verify RS256 signatures. Private key must never appear in schema.

version.description: Certification version identifier; must align with external system versioning.
